description: Frozen packed(source)<->numbered(artifact) expert representation map + exact source-derived vs artifact-derived text-only module-set equality (remaining Q35Q order items 1-2). Source set from an independent meta-device construction of Qwen3_5MoeForCausalLM; artifact set from the pinned weight index; the two reconcile to EXACT equality under the frozen map. Aggregate-only: counts + booleans, no module names.

frozen_representation_map.prefix: artifact model.language_model.* -> source model.* ; lm_head unchanged
frozen_representation_map.omission: artifact model.visual.* (vision) and mtp.* (MTP) omitted from the admitted text-only load manifest
frozen_representation_map.experts: artifact NUMBERED+SPLIT mlp.experts.{e}.{gate_proj,up_proj,down_proj} for e in [0,num_experts) collapse to source FUSED+PACKED mlp.experts.{gate_up_proj,down_proj}; every layer must carry exactly num_experts experts each with all three sub-modules

independence: source from meta-device class construction (no weight index inspected); artifact from the weight index (no class construction); compared by equality -> not self-bound
other_open_phase0_gates: route enumeration/checksum/storage/cleanup/resume/cache-isolation through the repaired staging orchestration (item 4)
one production-path final conjunction with adversarial self-binding/provenance tests (item 5)
weight staging only after the genuine aggregate Phase-0 pass (item 6)
separately authorized dual-3090 transition (item 7); exact TP/autograd runtime pin (item 8)
privacy: aggregate-only; counts and booleans, no module names, tensor values, weights, caches, or local paths
